document.title: 2G 1417, DK社 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 및 BOM 변경 件

sourceSummary.oneLine: Design review plan for requested 2G 1417 DK Deco Sheet change and BOM change.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to document review planning for a minor design change involving new deco sheet application and BOM update.
keyPoints: Part name is 1417_DK_DECO_SHEET and material code is MSH-100009_(1417_DK_DECO_SHEET).
Request category is marked 기타(외형 및 색상 변경).
